name: Feature request

## Use case

<!--
What problem are you trying to solve?  A concrete scenario
("I want to compute X in SQL but currently have to ...") helps more
than an abstract request.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What would the feature look like from the user's perspective?  If you
have a concrete API or SQL shape in mind, show an example query.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem; why they're less suitable. -->

## Background / references

Pointers to papers, other extensions (e.g. GProM, MayBMS, Perm), or
prior ProvSQL discussions that are relevant.  Optional.
